creator: freebsd@ohreally.nl
text:
Hi,

To keep /usr/local/etc tidy, it would be nice if this port would create a directory /usr/local/etc/clamav to store the files clamd.conf, clamd.conf.sample, freshclam.conf, freshclam.conf.sample, clamav-milter.conf and clamav-milter.conf.sample.

Thanks for considering.

Best,
  Rob
